testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Unable to parse remote response: request content-length too big or unknown. Host info: host: 'KMPR', ip: '10.65.132.42'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Unable to parse remote response: request content-length too big or unknown. Last 1 characters read: r, next 41 characters to read: equest content-length too big or unknown. testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setup
